name: feed_actor_to_friend_profile
description: Feed-row actor avatar/name navigates to the FriendProfileScreen. Verifies the activity-card header avatar (parity E2) is reachable as a tap target and lands on the friend profile with its hero + 4-cell stat row + This week chart panel. Dev mock data seeds a feed with friends Sara Lin / Marcus Okonkwo / Priya Varma — the flow taps the first non-self actor name visible in the feed. Status DRAFT: ActivityCardHeader actor avatar + name don't carry stable testTags yet (E2 wired the click but not the identifier), so the flow drills by visible display name.
